title: Zliide Dashboard
description: Designed a dashboard interface providing fashion brand stakeholders with important data statistics.
problem: Fashion brand stakeholders needed a clear window into their data, but the existing solution buried key metrics and lacked the clarity to make them actionable.
challenge: Fashion brand stakeholders needed a dashboard interface to access important data statistics. The existing solution lacked clarity and didn't effectively present key metrics.
solution: Designed a dashboard interface that provides fashion brand stakeholders with clear, actionable data statistics through intuitive visualizations and organized information architecture.

process.body: Worked out which data statistics mattered most to fashion brand stakeholders so the dashboard could lead with them.
Organized the information architecture so stakeholders could find and act on the right numbers without friction.
Designed clear visualizations, supported by the design system, to turn raw statistics into actionable insight.
